name: web-researcher-mcp
description: Your AI research assistant that cites real sources and stays honest. Search the entire web or narrow it down to just the sites you trust. Links that work, citations you can trust, no made up closed garden pre-synthesized results.

GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_API_KEY.description: Google Custom Search API key (optional if using Brave or other providers)

GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_ID.description: Google Custom Search engine ID (optional if using Brave or other providers)

BRAVE_API_KEY.description: Brave Search API key (required when SEARCH_PROVIDER=brave)

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web and get results from only the sites you trust, using search lenses

lens.description: Search lens to restrict results to trusted domains

tools.name: scrape_page
tools.description: Read the full text from any URL — web pages, PDFs, Word docs, YouTube transcripts

tools.name: search_and_scrape
tools.description: Search the web and read the top results in one step, ranked by quality

tools.name: image_search
tools.description: Search for images with size and type filters

tools.name: news_search
tools.description: Search news articles with freshness controls

tools.name: academic_search
tools.description: Search academic papers via Scholar, arXiv, and PubMed

source.description: Academic source (scholar, arxiv, pubmed, openalex, crossref)

tools.name: patent_search
tools.description: Search patents with multi-office filtering (US, EP, WO, CN, JP, KR)

tools.name: sequential_search
tools.description: Track multi-step research projects, noting what you found and what's still unanswered. Sessions persist for 4 hours and survive restarts.

searchStep.description: Summary of what was researched or discovered in this step

stepNumber.description: Current step number (start at 1 for new session)

nextStepNeeded.description: True if more steps follow; false to complete

sessionId.description: Session ID from first call. Required for steps 2+

researchGoal.description: The question or goal driving this research (step 1)

reasoning.description: Why you chose this direction over alternatives

confidence.description: Confidence in findings: high, medium, or low

responseMode.description: Force response format: full or summary

knowledgeGap.description: Unanswered question identified in this step

tools.name: get_research_session
tools.description: Recover a sequential_search session after context loss. Returns summary and recent steps.

stepId.description: Specific step number for full details
